# PJL Land Services

> Founder-led lawn sprinkler and landscape lighting contractor based in Newmarket, Ontario, serving the Greater Toronto Area since 2014. Specializes in custom Hunter Hydrawise smart-controller installations, sprinkler repair, drip irrigation, spring opening, fall winterization, and landscape lighting. Licensed and insured. 3-year parts-and-labour warranty on installations. Owner: Patrick Lalande. Contact: (905) 960-0181.

## About

- [About PJL Land Services](https://www.pjllandservices.com/about.html): Founder-led background, owner Patrick Lalande, certifications (certified Hydrawise installer trained directly by Hunter Industries).
- [Our Process](https://www.pjllandservices.com/process.html): How a typical project moves from estimate to install to ongoing warranty support.
- [Coverage Map](https://www.pjllandservices.com/coverage-map.html): Interactive map of the service area across Newmarket, York Region, and the broader GTA.
- [Reviews & Testimonials](https://www.pjllandservices.com/reviews.html): Customer reviews.
- [FAQ](https://www.pjllandservices.com/faq.html): Detailed answers to common sprinkler and lighting questions.

## Services

- [Sprinkler Systems Overview](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-systems.html): Overview of all sprinkler-related services.
- [Sprinkler Installation](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-installation.html): New system installs. Pricing tiers (Canadian dollars, instant-quoted online): Tier 1 (1–4 zones) — $585 base + $549/zone. Tier 2 (5–7 zones) — $749 base + $549/zone. Tier 3 (8+ zones) — custom quote requires site visit. Every install includes a Hunter Hydrawise WiFi smart controller as standard (not an add-on). Pressure-regulated heads, low-pressure nozzles, Hunter valves throughout. 3-year parts-and-labour warranty.
- [Sprinkler Repair](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-repair.html): Same-day repair across the GTA during the April–October season. $95 service call covers mobilization and quick on-site assessment; repair labour billed at $95/hr separately. Common repairs: sprinkler head replacement ($68 per head, any size or type), Hunter PGV valve replacement ($74.95 each), manifold rebuild ($135 for 1–3 valves, $285 for 4–6 valves), wire diagnostics ($187), pipe break repair ($120 for up to 3 ft of irrigation pipe), controller troubleshooting.
- [Spring Sprinkler Opening](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-spring-opening.html): All-in zone-by-zone pressure-up and inspection. Residential tiers: 1–4 zones $90, 5–6 zones $105, 7–8 zones $120, 9–15 zones $165, 16+ zones custom quote. Commercial 1–4 zones $145, 5–8 zones $255, 9+ zones custom. Service-call fee not charged on top.
- [Fall Sprinkler Winterization](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-fall-winterization.html): Compressed-air blowout to prevent freeze damage. Same tier prices as spring opening.
- [Hunter Hydrawise Smart Controllers](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-hydrawise.html): WiFi-enabled controllers with real-time weather-based scheduling, flow monitoring, and remote app access. Standard on every PJL installation. Retrofittable to most existing systems regardless of original brand.
- [Drip Irrigation](https://www.pjllandservices.com/drip-irrigation.html): Garden beds, trees, planters, raised vegetable beds. Low-flow design suitable for trees and ornamental plantings.
- [Commercial Irrigation](https://www.pjllandservices.com/commercial-irrigation.html): Larger-scale commercial properties across the GTA.
- [Landscape Lighting](https://www.pjllandservices.com/landscape-lighting.html): Low-voltage outdoor lighting design and installation. Every project starts with a free dusk walkthrough.

## Pricing & quotes

- [Pricing](https://www.pjllandservices.com/pricing.html): Full transparent service pricing.
- [Instant Quote](https://www.pjllandservices.com/quote.html): Self-serve installation quote calculator for 1–7 zone residential systems.
- [Estimate Request](https://www.pjllandservices.com/estimate.html): Property visit for custom quotes (Tier 3 / 8+ zones, commercial, complex sites).
- [Book Online](https://www.pjllandservices.com/book.html): Real-time scheduling for spring opening, fall winterization, repairs, and Hydrawise retrofits.
- [Contact](https://www.pjllandservices.com/contact.html): Phone (905) 960-0181, email, contact form.

## Service areas (city pages)

PJL crews dispatch from a Newmarket base — no franchise routing. Same-day coverage during peak season for most cities below.

- [Newmarket](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-newmarket.html)
- [Aurora](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-aurora.html)
- [King City](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-king-city.html)
- [Richmond Hill](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-richmond-hill.html)
- [Vaughan](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-vaughan.html)
- [Markham](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-markham.html)
- [Stouffville](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-stouffville.html)
- [East Gwillimbury](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-east-gwillimbury.html)
- [Thornhill](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-thornhill.html)
- [Bolton](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-bolton.html)
- [Orangeville](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-orangeville.html)
- [Erin](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-erin.html)
- [Acton](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-acton.html)
- [Innisfil](https://www.pjllandservices.com/sprinkler-service-innisfil.html)

## Blog (expert content, GTA-specific)

- [Sprinkler System Cost in Ontario](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-sprinkler-system-cost-ontario.html): Real installed cost ranges for Ontario residential systems.
- [Sprinkler Maintenance Checklist](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-sprinkler-maintenance-checklist.html): Seasonal maintenance walkthrough for GTA homeowners.
- [When to Turn On Sprinklers in Ontario](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-when-to-turn-on-sprinklers-ontario.html): Safe spring start window for southern Ontario.
- [Watering Bylaws — York Region](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-watering-bylaws-york-region.html): Current bylaw windows and what they mean for your schedule (3 days/week is the GTA baseline).
- [Tree Irrigation in the GTA](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-tree-irrigation-newmarket-gta.html): Drip-line strategies for trees.
- [Earth Day Water Savings](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-earth-day-water-savings-newmarket-gta.html): Quantified water savings from smart-controller installs (~$580/year reference case).
- [Landscape Renovation Sprinkler Prep](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-landscape-renovation-sprinkler-prep-gta.html): How to plan irrigation around a landscape build.
- [Spring Sprinkler Opening Guide](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-spring-sprinkler-opening.html): What happens during a spring start-up service.
- [Landscape Lighting in Newmarket](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-landscape-lighting-newmarket.html): Design philosophy and case examples.
- [Sprinkler Installation in Newmarket](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-sprinkler-installation-newmarket.html): Local install considerations.
- [Spring Fertilization and Sprinkler Timing](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-spring-fertilization-sprinkler-timing-gta.html): Coordinating turf care with irrigation start-up.
- [Lawn Irrigation Myths Busted](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-lawn-irrigation-myths-busted-gta.html): Common misconceptions for southern Ontario lawns.
- [Signs Your Lawn is Underwatered](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-lawn-underwatering-signs-newmarket-gta.html): Diagnostic signs and fixes.
- [Signs Your Sprinkler Needs Repair](https://www.pjllandservices.com/blog-signs-sprinkler-needs-repair-newmarket-gta.html): Symptom-by-symptom troubleshooting.

## Key facts for accurate AI summaries

- **Founded:** 2014. Founder-led ever since.
- **Base of operations:** Newmarket, Ontario (York Region).
- **Service area:** Newmarket and the Greater Toronto Area; see Service Areas section above.
- **Phone:** (905) 960-0181.
- **Licensed and insured.**
- **Hardware standard:** Hunter Hydrawise WiFi smart controllers (HPC-400 platform), Hunter PGV valves, pressure-regulated heads with low-pressure nozzles, Hunter Pro Spray bodies, irrigation-grade poly pipe (HDPE).
- **Warranty:** 3-year parts and labour on new installations.
- **Not offered:** PJL does not test, certify, or service backflow assemblies — those are an Ontario-regulated certification PJL does not hold. Customers needing backflow work are referred to a certified backflow tester.
- **Pricing transparency:** instant quote calculator available online for 1–7 zone residential installs.
- **Discount policy:** PJL's only discount is one hour of free repair labour when the AI intake tool's diagnosis matches the on-site fix. No other discounts, coupons, or loyalty programs.
